examples: I have seen a kestrel flying over the Deptford gasworks, and I have heard a first-rate performance by a blackbird in Euston Road.
A common kestrel chases a barn owl, which is carrying a mouse.
It hounds an alarmed kestrel out of the park, then barrels through a flock of seagulls.
On the way back to the Deer Park a kestrel appears, hovering and still in the wimpling wind.
The Kestrel (your starting ship) is equipped with more powerful starting guns, a less diverse crew, and no drones or drone system.
